gates.description: The canonical manifest has exactly 13 categories and 155 canonical capability IDs.
gates.reason: Verified 13 unique categories, 155 unique canonical IDs, and collision-free aliases.

gates.description: The release commit passes the full test, Ruff, mypy, lock, and diff verification suite.
gates.reason: A branch-local run is not immutable release-commit evidence.

gates.description: Published v0.3 evidence remains hash-bound and immutable.
gates.reason: Verified immutable published-history artifact hashes and release metadata.

gates.description: Package metadata, release notes, artifacts, and evidence consistently identify 0.4.0a0.
gates.reason: pyproject.toml and the unique uv.lock root package must both use 0.4.0a0.

gates.description: Final release-specific SPDX and dependency-license artifacts match the final lock and version.
gates.reason: Only the unreleased development-overlay evidence exists.

gates.description: The final wheel and source distribution are version-consistent, bounded, inspected, and checksum-bound.
gates.reason: Final 0.4.0a0 distributions and checksums do not exist.

gates.description: The final installed wheel passes every required artifact-bound smoke check.
gates.reason: Retained Docling evidence is intentionally focused and not a complete release smoke.

gates.description: Required verify and Linux containment jobs pass for the exact release commit.
gates.reason: Current branch CI is not an attestation for a finalized release commit.

gates.description: The exact reference unit passes static and runtime verification on the systemd 257+ target.
gates.reason: The target distribution has not supplied a hash- and commit-bound runtime attestation.

gates.description: Required-mode yt-dlp has brokered allowlisted egress, or release claims explicitly limit it to development mode.
gates.reason: The checker must confirm the narrower claim remains explicit throughout release documentation.

gates.description: A human reviewer approves exact model, NVIDIA, pypdfium2, browser, and binary notices and redistribution terms.
gates.reason: Technical license metadata is not legal approval.

gates.description: Exact-version optional tools and versioned connectors pass live smoke; remote services record date and endpoint.
gates.reason: The retained development evidence has missing, failed, or skipped live checks.

gates.description: The exact release commit is tagged and its GitHub Release contains the verified assets.
gates.reason: Publication is intentionally blocked until every prepublication gate passes.

gates.description: The verified wheel and source distribution are published under version 0.4.0a0.
gates.reason: Package publication is intentionally blocked until every prepublication gate passes.
